title: 12 Pcs Dark Red Artificial Velvet Roses, Real Touch Fake Rose with Single Long Stem, Artificial Flowers for Home, Garden, Party, Wedding Bouquet, Office Decorations
features: 🌹Details: Each package contains 12 beautiful and realistic fake roses, each artificial rose is 48cm tall. The stems of artificial roses are very flexible and can be resized according to the desired decorative effect.

🌹Real and lifelike: Each red rose is carefully crafted and is similar to real roses from color to texture. You can clearly see the texture on the flower heads and leaves of the fake roses, which is a great substitute for red roses.

🌹Stable flower stem: The flower stem of the dark red fake rose is made of sturdy material to ensure its stability and durability. There is also moderate elasticity on the flower stem, allowing you to easily adjust the angle and height of the silk flowers to meet different decorative needs.

🌹Long lasting: Compared with fresh flowers, these red artificial flowers will not wither or wither, and can maintain bright colors for a long time. Whether you place fake roses in the living room, office, garden or terrace, artificial roses have a good decorative effect.

🌹No odor: The materials used in artificial red roses have been strictly screened, so you don’t have to worry about red artificial flowers always emitting a bad smell. However, due to the long-term sealed transportation of silk flowers, it is normal to have a slight smell when you first receive the artificial red roses, and the smell will dissipate within a short period of time.
